title: Forgotten Angels
body:
Enter the enchanting realm of "Forgotten Angels," a captivating Minecraft mod inspired by the mystical beings of Dungeons and Dragons lore. Within this divine expansion, these celestial entities grace the world with their presence, embarking on a relentless quest to vanquish all forms of malevolence.

 

Prepare to experience an awe-inspiring fusion of DND-style angels with the beloved blocky universe of Minecraft. Unleash the power of Forgotten Angels and witness their righteous might as they defend your world against darkness and spread their radiant grace across your virtual world.

 

Requires Forgotten Mobs and Geckolib 1.19 - 3.1.40

 

Requires https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dnd-forgotten-mobs
